title: Jönköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Jönköping with a Z-Score of -4.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Jönköping are extremely cold, with a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 17.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 52% and the wind speed is moderate at 5.0 km/h. 
 There are no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded, indicating no need for cooling during this period.
conclusion: Implement emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap.
